Localization.Description: A user initiated the creation of a computer account. Attackers create computer accounts using accounts of users that are not administrators or do not have delegated permissions to add computer accounts. The created account can be used for lateral movement or privilege escalation.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} initiated the creation of computer account {object.account.name}@{object.account.domain} from host {src.host}
